name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES state, turn
StateSpace == [p \in 1..N |-> {idle, trying, critical}]

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in StateSpace
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Initial condition *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> idle]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \* Process p attempts to enter critical section
  \/ /\ p \in 1..N
     /\ state[p] = idle
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = trying]
     /\ turn' = turn
  \* Process p enters critical section if it is its turn
  \/ /\ p \in 1..N
     /\ state[p] = trying
     /\ turn = p
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = critical]
     /\ turn' = turn
  \* Process p exits critical section and passes turn to next process
  \/ /\ p \in 1..N
     /\ state[p] = critical
     /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = idle]
     /\ turn' = (p \mod N) + 1

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

====

name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N, participants, coordinator
VARIABLES state, votes, decision

Init ==
    /\ state = [p \in participants |-> "Init"]
    /\ votes = [p \in participants |-> "None"]
    /\ decision = "None"

Prepare ==
    /\ decision = "None"
    /\ \E p \in participants : state[p] = "Init"
    /\ \E p \in participants : state[p] = "Prepared"

VoteYes ==
    /\ decision = "None"
    /\ \E p \in participants : state[p] = "Prepared"
    /\ \E p \in participants : votes[p] = "Yes"

VoteNo ==
    /\ decision = "None"
    /\ \E p \in participants : state[p] = "Prepared"
    /\ \E p \in participants : votes[p] = "No"

Commit ==
    /\ decision = "None"
    /\ \A p \in participants : state[p] = "Prepared"
    /\ \A p \in participants : votes[p] = "Yes"
    /\ decision' = "Commit"

Abort ==
    /\ decision = "None"
    /\ \E p \in participants : state[p] = "Prepared"
    /\ \E p \in participants : votes[p] = "No"
    /\ decision' = "Abort"

Next ==
    \/ Prepare
    \/ VoteYes
    \/ VoteNo
    \/ Commit
    \/ Abort

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, votes, decision>>

====

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Fork ownership: forks[i] = j means fork i is held by philosopher j; forks[i] = -1 means fork i is free *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> -1]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

Next == \/ (* Philosopher i becomes hungry *)
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
          /\ states[i] = "hungry"
          /\ forks[i] = -1
          /\ forks[%(i, N) + 1] = -1
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![%(i, N) + 1] = i]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        \/ (* Philosopher i puts down forks after eating *)
          /\ states[i] = "eating"
          /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = -1, ![%(i, N) + 1] = -1]
          /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 1..N \cup {-1}]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag

(* --algorithm Bakery
    \* wait until all other processes have higher numbers or are not choosing
    \* wait until all other processes with lower numbers have exited
    \* critical section
    \* exit: set num[i] := 0

  exit(i) == \* process i exits critical section


  Next == \* nondeterministic choice of process i and action
    \* choose(i) \/ enter(i) \/ exit(i)
*)

====

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail

Init == /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 0
        /\ tail = 0

Next == 
  \/ /\ head < tail
      /\ head < K
         /\ head' = head + 1
            /\ q' = Append(q, head)
            /\ tail' = tail
      /\ head' = head
         /\ tail' = tail
  \/ /\ head = tail
      /\ head' = head
         /\ tail' = tail
      /\ head' = head
         /\ tail' = tail

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail>>

====

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Server

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



(* --state variables
*)

(* --initialization
Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = None
        /\ state = Follower
*)

(* --next-state relation
Next == \/ state = Follower /\ state' = Follower
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
      \/ state = Candidate /\ state' = Candidate
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = self
      \/ state = Leader /\ state' = Leader
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
*)

(* --specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>
*)

(* --type invariant
TypeOK == /\ currentTerm \in Nat
          /\ votedFor \in {None} \cup Server
          /\ state \in {Follower, Candidate, Leader}
*)

====

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \A r \in readers : r = r
        \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \A r \in readers : r = r
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
        \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ \A r \in readers : r = r
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

====

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

====

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
Min(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x =< y


CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_LOSS_PROBABILITY
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmit_counts, sent_chunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sent_chunks \in FiniteSets
    /\ retransmit_counts \in [chunk \in chunks |-> Int]
    /\ channel \in FiniteSets

Init ==
    /\ file = Seq
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Ceiling(FILE_SIZE \div CHUNK_SIZE) |-> SubSeq(file, (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE+1, Min(i*CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE))]
    /\ sent_chunks = {}
    /\ retransmit_counts = [chunk \in chunks |-> 0]
    /\ channel = {}

SendChunk ==
    /\ \E chunk \in chunks \setminus sent_chunks
    /\ channel' = channel \cup {chunk}
    /\ sent_chunks' = sent_chunks \cup {chunk}
    /\ retransmit_counts' = [retransmit_counts EXCEPT ![chunk] = retransmit_counts[chunk] + 1]
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, retransmit_counts>>

ReceiveChunk ==
    /\ \E chunk \in channel :
    /\ channel' = channel \setminus {chunk}
    /\ UNCHANGED <<file, chunks, sent_chunks, retransmit_counts>>

Next ==
    /\ \E chunk \in chunks \setminus sent_chunks
    /\ \E chunk \in channel :
    /\ \E chunk \in channel :
